name: reader-digest
description: Build, QA, and optionally email local EPUB reading digests from queued links and Markdown.

interface.shortDescription: Queue links and build EPUB reading bundles.
interface.longDescription: A local-first OpenClaw plugin for turning queued URLs, local Markdown files, and optional flagged newsletters into EPUB reader digests. It can store queue state in its own SQLite database, use a compatible external SQLite database, or operate from manifest files only. Email delivery is optional and never runs without explicit confirmation.
defaultPrompt: Add this article to my next reader digest.
Run QA on the latest reader digest EPUB.
